command: cargo bench --manifest-path compiler/rust/runtime/Cargo.toml --features core-io core-path --bench bench_core_io -- --noplot

scenarios.name: core_io.reader_copy_64k
scenarios.notes: Reader->Writer copy with 64 KiB payload, validates IoCopyBuffer fast path

scenarios.name: core_io.reader_copy_2m
scenarios.notes: Reader->Writer copy with 2 MiB payload, measures saturated throughput

scenarios.name: core_io.buffered_read_line_256
scenarios.notes: BufferedReader::read_line over 256 short lines (32 KiB buffer)

scenarios.name: core_io.buffered_read_line_2048
scenarios.notes: BufferedReader::read_line over 2,048 lines with mixed CRLF

scenarios.name: core_path.normalize_native
scenarios.notes: normalize_path_str on PATH_SAMPLES using native style

scenarios.name: core_path.normalize_windows
scenarios.notes: normalize_path_str on Windows style / UNC-like inputs

scenarios.name: core_io.watch_event_batch
scenarios.notes: Synthetic WatchEvent batch processing (512 events) in audit pipeline

next_steps: Capture OCaml Phase 2 results for the same scenarios to compute ±15% deltas
Integrate bench_core_io into nightly CI once watcher diagnostics are hooked
